project: On our own: Opportunities and Risks in the Individualization of Society
title: Na vsechno sami: prilezitosti a rizika individualizace spolecnosti

metadata.program: SPOLECENSKE A HUMANITNI VEDY: CLOVEK A LIDSTVO V GLOBALNICH VYZVACH SOUCASNOSTI

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: On our own: Opportunities and Risks in the Individualization of Society

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: Family, intergenerational relations, mental health, personalized care, trust, intergenerational conflict, data quality, questionnaire surveys

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The aim of the project is to conduct excellent research with an interdisciplinary approach to understand the opportunities and risks associated with individualisation that emphasises individual values, needs and preferences. The project aims not only to identify and analyse these risks, but also to propose strategies to minimise their impact and exploit opportunities to increase individual and societal resilience.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Szoke Igor, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Burget Lukas, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Karafiat Martin, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Omachtova Alena, Ing. (DCGM) Vendrame Katia, Ing. (DCGM) Vesely Karel, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) Zizka Josef, Ing. (DCGM)
